description_long: This is a rustic wooden table with a rectangular top that appears to be crafted from a single slab of wood, featuring natural edges and a visibly textured grain. The table is supported by two thick, carved end panels with decorative cutouts, connected by a horizontal stretcher for added stability. The legs and supports have an uneven, hand-hewn appearance, giving the table a handcrafted, organic look. The wood surface shows variations in color and texture, with some knots and imperfections visible, enhancing its natural aesthetic. The table sits on a wooden plank floor, which complements its earthy, robust character. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional components, emphasizing its simple, functional design.
description: A rustic, handcrafted wooden table with a natural-edged rectangular top and carved end supports, featuring a visibly textured wood grain and organic imperfections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop, two carved end supports, and the connecting stretcher.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the decorative cutouts in the end support panels.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the tabletop and supports, with minor wood imperfections visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the tabletop thickness and the carved details in the end panels.
attribute_number_of_legs: two thick carved end panels with a stretcher
